# Copilot Instructions

Always read and follow [devDocs/Copilot/CopilotInstructions.md](../devDocs/Copilot/CopilotInstructions.md)
before starting any task. The instructions there are the source of truth for how to work in this repo.

## Quick Reference (from CopilotInstructions.md)

- **Working Context First:** Always ask what the developer is working on. Don't just start doing. Ask for the GitHub Project item link and related issue/PR link.
- **Long Discussions:** Summarize in [devDocs/Copilot/chats.md](../devDocs/Copilot/chats.md).
- **Commits:** Ask which GitHub project task to associate. Confirm push vs commit-only. Ask if closing the issue.
- **Closing Issues:** Only on developer request. Verify issue name/number, that all work is done and checked in, then supply a formatted comment (raw markdown in chat for copy-paste).

See [devDocs/Copilot/CopilotInstructions.md](../devDocs/Copilot/CopilotInstructions.md) for full details on commit message format and issue closure comment format.
